notes: Live portal evidence clustered around RM680k–RM960k asks for Reflection/Surian units in Mutiara Damansara and roughly RM710–RM783 psf from recent Brickz Surian Residences transactions. After adjusting those psf levels to the subject’s 1,184 sq ft built-up, a fair estimate is about RM860k (around RM726 psf), with a realistic low–high band of RM800k–RM930k. This excludes rentals and room-only listings.
